title: achyranthes arborescens
intro: Achyranthes arborescens, also known as the Chinese bugweed or miao-ling, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, Achyranthes arborescens is often used in combination with other herbs, and can be administered in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments.
